flows.title: Authentication Coverage
flows.description: Ensure non-public routes enforce caller identity through explicit dependency injection.
flows.missing_description: Endpoint is missing an explicit authentication dependency or guard.
flows.missing_impact: Unauthorized callers may invoke protected operations and access sensitive data.
flows.missing_fix: Inject an authentication dependency (e.g. Depends(get_current_user)) or add auth middleware on the router.

flows.title: Authorization Coverage
flows.description: Ensure mutating non-public routes enforce role/scope/permission checks.
flows.missing_description: Mutating endpoint is missing explicit authorization/role checks.
flows.missing_impact: Authenticated but unauthorized actors may alter protected resources.
flows.missing_fix: Introduce role/scope policy checks via dependency, middleware, or service guard.

flows.title: Resource Ownership Verification
flows.description: Ensure authenticated endpoints that access resources by ID verify the caller owns or is authorized to access that resource, preventing IDOR attacks.
flows.missing_description: Authenticated endpoint accesses a resource by path-parameter ID without verifiable ownership or tenant scoping in the service layer.
flows.missing_impact: Any authenticated user can potentially read or modify another user's or organization's resources (Insecure Direct Object Reference / IDOR).
flows.missing_fix: Pass the authenticated caller's org_id or user_id to every service method that fetches by resource ID and assert ownership before returning data.

flows.title: Request Validation Coverage
flows.description: Ensure write routes validate incoming payloads with explicit schemas.
flows.missing_description: Write endpoint lacks a typed request body schema for input validation.
flows.missing_impact: Malformed or unexpected payloads can reach business logic and corrupt state.
flows.missing_fix: Declare a Pydantic request model as a typed body parameter to enforce schema validation.

flows.title: Response Contract Coverage
flows.description: Ensure routes return enforceable response contracts.
flows.missing_description: Endpoint returns data without an explicit response model contract.
flows.missing_impact: Client/back-end drift and accidental PII leakage through unfiltered dict returns.
flows.missing_fix: Set response_model= on the route decorator or return a typed Pydantic schema instance.

flows.title: Error Handling Coverage
flows.missing_description: Endpoint lacks clear error handling coverage.
flows.missing_impact: Unhandled exceptions can return stack traces or opaque 500 errors to clients.
flows.missing_fix: Add route-level try/except blocks or register a global exception handler.

flows.title: Input Sanitization Coverage
flows.description: Ensure user input is sanitized before risky sinks.
flows.missing_description: Risky sink usage is not paired with explicit sanitization.
flows.missing_impact: Unsanitized input may trigger SQL injection, command injection, or template injection.
flows.missing_fix: Sanitize/escape untrusted fields before passing to SQL, template, command, or file sinks.

flows.title: Secret and PII Protection
flows.description: Ensure response schemas that expose sensitive fields redact or exclude them before transmission.
flows.missing_description: Response schema exposes sensitive fields without redaction or exclusion.
flows.missing_impact: Secrets, tokens, or PII may be transmitted in API responses and appear in logs.
flows.missing_fix: Use response_model_exclude, field aliasing, or explicit redaction to omit sensitive fields.

flows.title: Rate Limit Coverage
flows.description: Ensure abuse-prone auth and token-issuance endpoints have rate-limiting controls.
flows.missing_description: Abuse-prone authentication/registration route lacks rate-limiting controls.
flows.missing_impact: Credential stuffing and brute-force attacks can succeed without throttling safeguards.
flows.missing_fix: Apply a route or middleware throttling policy (e.g. slowapi, fastapi-limiter) for public auth endpoints.

flows.title: Audit and Trace Coverage
flows.description: Ensure sensitive state-changing operations emit traceable audit events.
flows.missing_description: Sensitive state-changing endpoint lacks auditable trace coverage.
flows.missing_impact: Incident investigation and accountability become difficult without audit trails.
flows.missing_fix: Emit structured audit log entries with request/correlation identifiers for all state-changing operations.

flows.title: Idempotency and Transaction Safety
flows.description: Ensure high-risk mutating routes guard retries and partial side effects.
flows.missing_description: High-risk mutating endpoint lacks idempotency/transaction safeguards.
flows.missing_impact: Retries or partial failures can create duplicate or inconsistent state.
flows.missing_fix: Add idempotency keys and transaction boundaries for side-effect safety.
